product_overview: Vulagent Scanner is an AI-powered, distributed API vulnerability assessment platform that uses a swarm of specialized agents and a hybrid AI cortex to autonomously discover, verify, and report API security issues. It provides real-time telemetry via WebSocket, persistent findings storage, and AI-driven forensic PDF reports.
core_goals: Provide autonomous end-to-end API security scanning: Recon → Assessment → Exploitation → Reporting
Deliver scalable distributed scan orchestration with Master/Worker clustering and Redis-backed coordination
Use hybrid AI (deterministic GI5 + neural LLM) for payload generation, classification, and explainable remediation
Expose clear APIs and real-time streams for integration with UI and automation pipelines
Ensure safe, auditable operations with rate limits, domain whitelist, and forensic evidence capture

features.name: Scan Orchestration (Launch & Lifecycle)
features.description: Start and control distributed scans. Orchestrator bootstraps agent swarm, schedules jobs, records state, and broadcasts scan lifecycle events.
user_flows: POST /api/attack/fire with AttackPayload (target_url, modules, duration, velocity, concurrency) -> Receive 200 with {status: 'Swarm Online', scan_id} -> GET /api/dashboard/scans -> Receive 200 with scan entry including scan_id and status 'running' -> CONNECT WebSocket /stream?client_type=ui -> Receive SCAN_UPDATE for scan_id with status 'running' -> GET /api/reports/pdf/{scan_id} after completion -> Receive 200 application/pdf (downloadable forensic report)

POST /api/attack/fire with malformed AttackPayload (missing target_url or invalid modules[]) -> Receive 400/422 with validation error message -> GET /api/dashboard/scans -> Receive 200 and no new scan entry for the invalid request

features.name: Recon Ingestion
features.description: Ingest browser or extension-collected reconnaissance payloads into the system for archival, deduplication, and feeding agent discovery pipelines.
user_flows: POST /api/recon/ingest with ReconPayload (url, method, headers, body, timestamp) -> Receive 200 ack with {ingest_id} -> CONNECT WebSocket /stream?client_type=spy -> Receive RECON_PACKET events containing the ingested recon payload and severity tags
POST /api/recon/ingest with invalid JSON or missing required fields -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with validation errors -> No RECON_PACKET published

features.name: Real-time Telemetry (WebSocket Stream)
features.description: Provide live attack/agent telemetry and scan lifecycle events to UIs and integrations via WebSocket endpoints (/stream or /ws/live).
user_flows: CONNECT WebSocket /stream?client_type=ui -> Receive LIFECYCLE_EVENT with state and mode -> Receive LIVE_ATTACK_FEED messages for ongoing requests (timestamp, agent, method, endpoint, severity, risk_score) -> Receive REPORT_READY when report is available for a scan_id
CONNECT WebSocket /stream when backend is down or unreachable -> Connection refused or WebSocket handshake fails -> Client receives network error / cannot subscribe to live events

features.name: Forensic Reporting (PDF)
features.description: Generate and serve AI-enhanced PDF forensic reports summarizing findings, attack chains, evidence, and remediation.
user_flows: POST /api/attack/fire to launch scan -> Wait until orchestrator completes scan -> GET /api/reports/pdf/{scan_id} -> Receive 200 with application/pdf and downloadable report containing executive summary, CVSS-like scores, and attack chains
GET /api/reports/pdf/{nonexistent_scan_id} -> Receive 404 Not Found with error indicating the scan_id does not exist or report not ready

features.name: Dashboard Metrics & Scan Listing
features.description: Expose aggregated metrics, historical graph data, recent activity, and scan records used by the frontend dashboard.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/stats -> Receive 200 with metrics (total_scans, active_scans, vulnerabilities, critical), graph_data, recent_activity -> UI renders updated metric cards and graph
GET /api/dashboard/stats during high load or backend failure -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable or 500 with error message -> UI falls back to cached dashboardState or shows error notification

features.name: AI Cortex & GI5 Forensic Engine
features.description: Hybrid AI stack: GI5 deterministic engine for fast sanitization, entropy and rule-based detection; Cortex (neural) for context-aware payload generation, executive summaries and remediation. Bayesian fusion merges outputs.
user_flows: POST /api/ai/generate_payloads with context (vuln_type, response_sample) -> Receive 200 with generated payloads array from GI5 + Cortex fusion -> Sigma/Beta agents consume payloads via EventBus and execute against target endpoints

POST /api/ai/generate_payloads when Ollama/remote LLM is unavailable -> Cortex falls back to GI5 deterministic output -> Receive 200 with reduced (deterministic) payload set and circuit_breaker status indicating LLM fallback

features.name: 2FA Authentication and Dashboard Access
features.description: TOTP-based two-factor authentication for dashboard access and session gating (QR generation, verification, login).
user_flows: POST /api/dashboard/settings/2fa/generate -> Receive 200 with TOTP secret and QR code payload -> POST /api/dashboard/settings/2fa/verify with TOTP code -> Receive 200 enabled confirmation -> POST /api/dashboard/auth/login with TOTP -> Receive 200 with session token and dashboard access
POST /api/dashboard/auth/login with invalid TOTP -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with 'invalid 2FA' message -> Access to dashboard pages blocked

features.name: Defense Analyze (Browser/DOM Analysis)
features.description: Browser-extension or sentinel-provided defensive analysis to detect prompt injection, malicious DOM content and provide verdicts.
user_flows: POST /api/defense/analyze with body {agent_id, content, url, session_id} -> Receive 200 with {verdict: 'BLOCK'|'ALLOW', reason, risk_score} -> If verdict 'BLOCK' frontend or extension triggers blocking behavior
POST /api/defense/analyze with malformed content or unsupported agent_id -> Receive 400/422 with validation error -> No defense verdict produced

features.name: GI5 Forensic Engine
features.description: 6-Core deterministic cyber-forensic logic for threat analysis

features.name: Cortex Hybrid AI
features.description: Bayesian weighting and LLM fallback orchestration

features.name: Scan Orchestration
features.description: Hive-based distributed scan management and scheduling

features.name: Recon Ingestion
features.description: Capture and archive network recon data packets

features.name: Attack Agents
features.description: 8+ Specialized agents for vulnerability research (Sigma, Kappa, etc.)

known_limitations.issue: Complex asynchronous state machines may lead to race conditions under 100% load
